name: boundary-mock-rules-compliance
task: Write tests for the SQL validation logic in the query_data tool. Test that SELECT and WITH statements are allowed, that INSERT/DELETE/UPDATE/DROP/CREATE are rejected, and that column names like 'updated_at' do not trigger false positives.
assertions: DuckDB is NOT mocked — tests use a real in-memory DuckDB instance for SQL validation
At least one test verifies that a query starting with SELECT passes validation
At least one test verifies that a query starting with WITH (CTE) passes validation
At least one test verifies that queries containing INSERT, DELETE, UPDATE, DROP, or CREATE are rejected
At least one test verifies that the word-boundary check allows column names containing reserved words (e.g., 'updated_at' containing 'update')
